case_title: WASHINGTON CREDIT, INC.,A CORP vs. HENDRIX, PATRICIA et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WASHINGTON CREDIT, INC.,A CORP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HENDRIX, PATRICIA $2,917.88 PRINCIPAL, $600.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,430.56 INTEREST, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,083.44
